name: Patient X
history: Recent deaths in the family: an uncle and a cousin. Ongoing concern about parents' health. Father's health conditions include uncontrolled diabetes, high blood pressure, kidney problems, and high cholesterol. Tension with father related to emotional distance and lack of transparency about health issues.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must be strong and take care of others to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't help or fix things, I am failing.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of emotionally charged situations and people.
situation: Thinking about the possibility of the father dying before the mother. Avoiding interaction with the father.
auto_thought: I can't handle losing my father and the responsibilities that will come with it.
behavior: Avoidance of interaction with father and emotionally charged situations.
